subject: [RFC PATCH 06/40] mm: page_alloc: async evacuation of stolen movable pageblocks

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch introduces a lightweight asynchronous evacuation mechanism to prevent memory fragmentation caused by movable pageblocks being stolen for unmovable or reclaimable allocations. When a movable pageblock is claimed, a work item is queued to migrate the remaining movable pages out, allowing future allocations to be concentrated in fewer pageblocks and reducing fragmentation.
